bull.t: Strong Cash Generation & Conservative Balance Sheet
bull.b: Robust operating cash and a large cash reserve with virtually no leverage boost resilience to cyclical downturns and fund organic growth or M&A. Positive free cash flow and low debt reduce refinancing risk, enabling sustained investment in products and capacity over the next several years without dilutive capital raise

bear.t: Timing Risk For Optics Ramp And Rising Opex
bear.b: While optics is a strategic growth vector, its revenue timing depends on customer deployment choices and integration of acquired tech.
